name: Money, My Love
original_name: ก็รักมันปักใจ
overview: A disillusioned billionaire heir Trai abandons his fortune and hides among ordinary people, where he falls for Phakbung, a day laborer who believes money is everything. As love deepens, Trai must confront his fear that wealth will once again come before true love.

trailers.title: ก็รักมันปักใจ เร็วๆนี้ | Ch3Thailand
